context: Tests whether the response correctly explains Terraform state locking with remote backends.

checklist.name: Recommends remote backend with locking
checklist.description: Suggests a remote backend that supports locking (S3 + DynamoDB, GCS, Azure Blob, Terraform Cloud, etc.)

checklist.name: Shows backend configuration
checklist.description: Provides the HCL backend configuration block with the necessary locking parameters (e.g., dynamodb_table for S3)

checklist.name: Explains lock behavior
checklist.description: Explains that Terraform acquires a lock before state operations and releases it after, preventing concurrent modifications

checklist.name: Addresses stuck lock recovery
checklist.description: Mentions terraform force-unlock or manual lock removal from the lock store as recovery for stuck locks

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about Terraform state management
